pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven to compile the project targeting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project continues to compile against the previous Java version (e.g., Java 8), failing to utilize Java 21 features or meeting the migration requirement.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target Java 21.
spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 8 bytecode and language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

springdata-jpa/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.
springdata-jpa/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may lack support for the 'release' flag or fail to compile against newer JDK toolchains.

springdata-jpa/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 21.
springdata-jpa/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern JDKs; using old flags with JDK 21 may cause compilation warnings or errors depending on plugin version.

springdata-mongodb/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.
springdata-mongodb/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 compilation correctly.

springdata-mongodb/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 21.
springdata-mongodb/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern Java versions; using them with Java 21 may cause compilation errors or incorrect class file versions.

springdata-neo4j/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag to compile for Java 21.
springdata-neo4j/pom.xml.why_exists: Older maven-compiler-plugin versions or source/target settings for Java 7 are incompatible with Java 21 language features and toolchains; the release flag is the standard for modern JDK compilation.

springdata-redis/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation features.
springdata-redis/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 language features correctly, leading to compilation failures or missing bytecode attributes.

springdata-redis/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 21.
springdata-redis/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern Java versions; using them with Java 21 can lead to mismatched API usage or compilation errors if not handled correctly by the plugin.
